levels.name: First Bite
levels.hint: You are the cyan cell. Drift into the blue one to absorb it.

levels.name: Reach Out
levels.hint: Hold A (gamepad) or Space (keyboard) to thrust. You eject mass behind you to move forward.

levels.name: Course Correct
levels.hint: Hold a D-pad direction (or arrow key) to aim — your arrow swings toward that angle. Hold two adjacent directions together to lock onto a 45° diagonal: the only line that catches all three neutrals in a single thrust.

levels.name: Conservation
levels.hint: Every thrust costs you mass. Every meal restores it. Stay solvent.

levels.name: Ricochet
levels.hint: Walls bounce you back perfectly elastically. Aim up-right at 45° and boost (B on gamepad / Z on keyboard) — one big kick stays on the angular path. Sustained thrust scatters propellant motes that drift onto your line and knock you off the next intercept.

levels.name: Drift
levels.hint: Space, not water. Velocity persists. A small push goes a long way.

levels.name: Recapture
levels.hint: Your propellant is food. Catch the motes you ejected — and the splitter's children fly outward, so chase them too.

levels.name: Brake!
levels.hint: Eject toward your direction of travel to slow down. Don't fly into the red.

levels.name: First Orbit
levels.hint: Mass at the center pulls you in. Move sideways fast enough — that's orbit.

levels.name: Whirlpool
levels.hint: Stronger well, deeper rings. Eat outside-in. Don't fall through the floor.

levels.name: Read the Tide
levels.hint: Blue: smaller than you, safe to eat. Red: bigger, will absorb you.

levels.name: First Hunter
levels.hint: Hunters chase smaller cells. You're bigger here — let it come to you.

levels.name: The Avoider
levels.hint: Avoiders flee from anything bigger — including the larger neutrals on the field. Use them like walls to cut the avoider's escape angle.

levels.name: Pack
levels.hint: Five hunters of mismatched size. Each is individually weak — but the bigger ones already see the smaller ones as prey, so the cascade starts on its own. Pick them off before any one consolidates into something bigger than you.

levels.name: Apex
levels.hint: The giant is too big to fight. Dodge, gather a few neutrals to grow, and wait while it thrusts itself thin chasing you. When its mass drops below yours, turn around.

levels.name: Standoff Field
levels.hint: Cells within 5% of your mass won't absorb either way. Grow first.

levels.name: Color Cascade
levels.hint: Each cell is just barely bigger than the last. Eat in order.

levels.name: The Lure
levels.hint: The hunter wants the avoider. Drive them together. Anti-motes will erase any propellant you eject through them.

levels.name: Slingshot
levels.hint: Drop into orbit, swing past the well, and let it fling you outward.

levels.name: The Wall
levels.hint: Packed cells, bigger threats mixed in. Stay alive for 2 minutes — eat the small ones to grow, dodge the rest.

levels.name: Mass Thief
levels.hint: A predator stalks you from behind, eating every mote you eject. Magnets in the field will pull your propellant astray.

levels.name: Patience
levels.hint: Two predators want each other. Don't engage. The winner will be hard, but tired.

levels.name: Mote Economy
levels.hint: The glutton drains anything smaller in its halo. Stay outside, eat the fat neutrals around the perimeter to grow, then close in once you outmass it.

levels.name: Predator's Predator
levels.hint: The predator outmasses you. Stand your ground, let it charge, then dodge perpendicular at the last moment — its momentum carries it past you and into the anti-mote you've been standing in front of.

levels.name: The Garden
levels.hint: Everything you've learned, plus a few new wildflowers: splitters, magnets, repellers, and a pulsar.

levels.name: Twin Rings
levels.hint: Two orbits, opposite rotations. A singularity-child rides one of them — its tiny well disturbs everything nearby.

levels.name: Pressure
levels.hint: Predators in the outer ring, hungry pups in the middle. Eat fast. Stay moving.

levels.name: Black Tide
levels.hint: Strong gravity. A predator ring blocks the bottom. The pulsar at the center kicks orbits askew on every beat.

levels.name: Genesis
levels.hint: A complete ecosystem — every kind you've met, all at once. Read the field, then fight for the throne.

levels.name: Singularity
levels.hint: Strong well. An apex hunter on your ring. Both physics and predation, at once.
